info.description:
A RESTful API for a pair-based online quiz game.
Players compete head-to-head answering 5 questions. Super admin manages questions and users.
info.title: Online Quiz Game API

post.description: Authenticate with email and password, return access and refresh tokens

get.description: Returns email, login and userId of the authenticated user

post.description: Create a new user account and return access and refresh tokens
If a pending game exists the calling user is added as second player and the game starts. Otherwise a new pending game is created.
post.summary: Join or create a quiz game

get.description: Returns the game in status PendingSecondPlayer or Active. Returns 404 when no active game.
get.summary: Get the calling user's current active game

post.description: Submits an answer to the next unanswered question in the current active game. One attempt per question. Sequential order.
post.summary: Submit an answer for the current question

403.description: No active game or all questions answered

get.description: Returns the game in any status. The calling user must be a participant.

delete.description: Permanently delete the authenticated user's account

get.description: Return the authenticated user's profile information

put.description: Update the authenticated user's first name, last name, or avatar URL

put.summary: Publish or unpublish a quiz question (SA)

post.summary: Add new user to the system (SA)

delete.description: Truncates all application tables. For testing purposes only.

post.description: Change the authenticated user's email address with password verification. Requires current password to prevent unauthorized changes.

400.description: Invalid request body or validation error

post.description: Change the authenticated user's password with current password verification. This will invalidate all existing sessions except the current one.

400.description: Invalid request body or validation error

post.description: Clear refresh token cookie and invalidate session

Exchange refresh token for a new access token. Accepts refresh token via httpOnly cookie (web clients) or Authorization Bearer header (mobile clients). Implements token rotation - returns new refresh token on success.

get.description: Performs a health check of the application and its dependencies (database)

refreshToken.description: Refresh token (long-lived, 7 days) - also set as httpOnly cookie

error.description: Message is the safe message sent to the client.

BearerAuth.description: Type "Bearer" followed by a space and JWT token.
BearerAuth.name: Authorization
